sed -n '1,240p' api/openapi.yaml

item.text: {"version":"1","taskId":"add-account-status","requestedField":"account_status","summary":"The User client is generated from api/openapi.yaml. I found the generator already maps non-required string properties to optional TypeScript fields, so I’ll add account_status only to the schema properties, regenerate the client, and extend the client test to cover both omission and inclusion.","commandsRun":["pwd","rg --files","find .. -name AGENTS.md -print","git status --short","sed -n ... api/openapi.yaml scripts/generator-core.ts scripts/generate-client.ts generated/api-client.ts tests/client.test.ts","cat package.json"]}

item.text: {"version":"1","taskId":"add-account-status","requestedField":"account_status","summary":"The schema and coverage are updated. The repository’s tsx CLI could not open its local IPC pipe in this sandbox, so I’m using Node’s tsx import hook to run the same generator without the IPC server, then I’ll run the tests separately.","commandsRun":["pnpm generate:api && pnpm test (generator blocked by sandbox EPERM before tests ran)"]}

item.text: {"version":"1","taskId":"add-account-status","requestedField":"account_status","summary":"Added account_status as an optional string in the User OpenAPI schema and regenerated API client. Extended tests to cover omitted and populated values. All 2 tests, TypeScript checking, and diff validation passed.","commandsRun":["pnpm generate:api && pnpm test (generation blocked by sandbox IPC permissions)","node --import tsx scripts/generate-client.ts","pnpm test","git diff --check","pnpm exec tsc --noEmit"]}
